Apply ALL of the following 6 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 265, 326, 331
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: control

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

### Fix 3
Lines: 264, 322, 331
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Tooltip

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 264):
  263                      >
  264                        <Button
  265                          variant="control"

  (line 322):
  321              <ActionGroup>
  322                <Button
  323                  isLoading={isLoading}

  (line 331):
  330                </Button>
  331                <Button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} variant={ButtonVariant.link}>
  332                  {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 168
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

```

  169        ref={toggleRef}

```

### Fix 5
Line: 45
Rule [sd-test-select-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Select is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Select renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Select may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Select
  localName: Select
  module: @patternfly/react-core


Tooltip is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Tooltip renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Tooltip may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/external-systems/CreateFlashSystem/FlashSystemConnectionDetails/system-connection-details.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
The `variant` values used are `"control"`, `ButtonVariant.primary`, and `ButtonVariant.link`. The type change only **adds** `'stateful'` to the union — all existing values remain valid. No code change needed.

### Fix 2: Select `onSelect` and `popperProps` type changes
- Line 300: `onSelect={onModeSelect}` — The signature change is `value?: string | number` → `value?: SelectOptionProps['value']`. Looking at the `onModeSelect` handler (line 102), it takes `(event, value)` and uses `value` as a key in `volumeMapper`. The `SelectOptionProps['value']` type is broader but the usage should work. The type is compatible. No functional code change needed.
- Line 306: `popperProps={{ width: 'trigger' }}` — Type changed from `SelectPopperProps` to `PopperOptions`. The `width: 'trigger'` property should still be valid in `PopperOptions`. No code change needed.

### Fix 3: Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
- Line 264-269: Button with `variant="control"` contains `{reveal ? <EyeSlashIcon /> : <EyeIcon />}`. This is an icon-only button — move content to `icon` prop.
- Lines 322-329: Button with `variant={ButtonVariant.primary}` contains `{isLoading ? t('Connecting') : t('Connect')}`. This is **text only**, no icon. No change needed.
- Line 331: Button with `variant={ButtonVariant.link}` contains `{t('Cancel')}`. This is **text only**, no icon. No change needed.

### Fix 4: Icon children to `icon` prop on MenuToggle
- Lines 167-178: MenuToggle contains `{inverseVolumeMapper[formState.volmode] || Object.keys(volumeMapper)[0]}`. This is **text content**, not an icon. No change needed.

### Fix 5 & 6: Test behavioral changes for Select and Tooltip
These are informational/test-related warnings. This is not a test file, so no code changes are needed.

The only actual code change needed is **Fix 3** for the icon-only Button at line 264. Let me apply it:
Now let me verify the result looks correct:

content.text: The edit looks correct. The icon-only Button now passes the icon via the `icon` prop and is self-closing. Let me also verify the rest of the file is intact:

Good — the other two Button instances (lines 321 and 330) contain only text, no icons, so they correctly remain unchanged.

Let me also verify the MenuToggle and Select sections are intact:

Everything looks correct. The file is already using the v6 Select API with `SelectList`, `SelectOption`, `toggle` render function, `onOpenChange`, and `selected` — all v6 patterns. The Select section is already migrated.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (adding `'stateful'`)
**No change needed.** The type change only *adds* `'stateful'` to the union. All existing values used in the file (`"control"`, `ButtonVariant.primary`, `ButtonVariant.link`) remain valid in the new type.

### Fix 2 — Select `onSelect` and `popperProps` type changes
**No change needed.** The Select component is already using the v6 API (`SelectList`, `SelectOption`, `toggle` render function, `onOpenChange`, `selected`). The `onSelect` handler signature `(event, value)` is compatible with the new `SelectOptionProps['value']` type. The `popperProps={{ width: 'trigger' }}` is compatible with the new `PopperOptions` type.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on Button
**Applied** at line 264 (now line 264). The icon-only `<Button variant="control">` that contained `{reveal ? <EyeSlashIcon /> : <EyeIcon />}` was changed to use the `icon` prop and made self-closing. The other two Button instances at lines 322 and 331 contain only text (no icons), so no change was needed for those.

### Fix 4 — Icon children to `icon` prop on MenuToggle
**No change needed.** The `<MenuToggle>` at line 168 contains text content (`{inverseVolumeMapper[formState.volmode] || Object.keys(volumeMapper)[0]}`), not an icon element. No migration is required.

### Fix 5 — Select transitive behavioral changes (Popper appendTo)
**No change needed.** This is a test-related behavioral warning about Popper's `appendTo` default changing. This is not a test file, so no code changes apply.

### Fix 6 — Tooltip transitive behavioral changes (Popper appendTo)
**No change needed.** Same as Fix 5 — this is a test-related behavioral warning. This is not a test file, so no code changes apply.

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
